mapper.select: SELECT * FROM hotel_kiosk.members m JOIN hotel_kiosk.reservations r ON m.member_no = r.member_no GROUP BY m.member_no ORDER BY m.member_no LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT * FROM members ORDER BY member_no
SELECT * FROM hotel_kiosk.members m JOIN hotel_kiosk.reservations r ON m.member_no = r.member_no WHERE m.member_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{memberName}, '%')
SELECT * FROM hotel_kiosk.members m JOIN hotel_kiosk.reservations r ON m.member_no = r.member_no WHERE m.member_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{memberPhone}, '%')
SELECT check_in_at FROM reservations WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND check_in_at IS NOT NULL AND status in ('In', 'Out') ORDER BY check_in_at DESC LIMIT 1;
